title: Activist fund pushes for board refresh at a regional bank
summary: The fund disclosed a new campaign, requested two board seats, and signaled it may pursue a proxy contest if governance changes are not adopted.

title: Portfolio company files 8-K announcing CFO transition
summary: The issuer filed an 8-K disclosing the CFO will step down next month and an interim finance chief has been appointed.

title: Industrial issuer updates full-year guidance after weaker demand
summary: Management lowered full-year revenue guidance and said demand remains below internal planning assumptions.

title: Take-private discussion reported for software vendor
summary: A financial sponsor is reportedly evaluating a take-private transaction and lenders have been approached for preliminary financing feedback.
